rationale: The current translation is the most stable and accurate. Candidate a4fb87a1d010ba51cf18e0e4b2f6e66a08a5c663 has broken code blocks (extra ~~~ and text outside blocks). Candidate 423226642ee0657b6c120ded6ce432d5a9f47ba7 leaves several headings in English. Candidate 08eed71b0bf566286622674c82c3aebd71ce4ccd also breaks a code block by inserting a heading-like comment outside the block. The 'current' version correctly translates the prose while keeping the technical commands intact and preserving the MDX structure.
